events.name: UN General Assembly (UNGA 81)
events.notes: High-value networking. Side events: SDG Education Summit, Education Cannot Wait gala. 5 Tier 1/2 funders likely attending. Apply to speak at SDG Education side event.

events.name: African Philanthropy Forum Annual Summit
events.notes: Top East Africa philanthropy gathering. Strong local funder presence. Timamu positioning opportunity alongside LearnImpact. Aga Khan and Mastercard likely attending.

events.name: Global Education Summit 2026
events.notes: Hempel's home turf — Rosa will likely attend. Pre-Hearing Committee relationship investment. GPE and UNICEF also present. Apply to present SOMA evidence.

events.name: Catalyst 2030 Global Summit
events.notes: Systems change funders. Strong Skoll and Omidyar presence. SOMA's systems-change narrative fits well. LearnImpact is newly independent — good origin story for this audience.

events.name: WISE Summit 2026
events.notes: Qatar Foundation's flagship education summit. Gulf and Middle East funders well represented. Dubai Cares attends. Good for QJE evidence presentation.
